description: List properties and responses of structural element nodes in the range.

keywords.name: acceleration-local
keywords.description: translational and rotational acceleration. The following keywords, if present, specify the coordinate system in which these values are expressed. values are expressed in the global system values are expressed in the node-local system. This is the default if no keyword is specified.

keywords.name: apply-moment
keywords.description: apply conditions on the node. One of the following keywords can be supplied to specify which apply condition is listed. applied force and system in which it is specified (global or node-local). This is the default if no keyword is specified. applied moment and system in which it is specified (global or node-local)

keywords.name: connectivity
keywords.description: component-id numbers of all structural elements that are connected to this node

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: damping type (local, combined, Rayleigh or Maxwell) and associated properties

keywords.name: displacement-local
keywords.description: translational and rotational displacement. The following keywords, if present, specify the coordinate system in which these values are expressed. values are expressed in the global system values are expressed in the node-local system. This is the default if no keyword is specified.

keywords.name: fix-local
keywords.description: fixity state of node-local coordinate system (if free, then the system orientation will be set by the structural element that uses the node; if fixed, then the system orientation will remain fixed).

keywords.name: fixity
keywords.description: velocity fixity conditions for each degree of freedom (free, fixed or slaved to velocity of target object)

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: group assignment(s). If slot is specified, then list the group assignment, if any, in slot s .

keywords.name: link
keywords.description: component-id numbers of any links that are attached to the node

keywords.name: mass
keywords.description: translational and rotational mass expressed in the node-local system

keywords.name: position-reference
keywords.description: position. There are two different position values; the following keywords (if present) allow you to select which position is listed. By default, the reference position is listed. current position of the node, which is updated from the starting (or reference) position even in small-strain mode reference position of the node, which is updated only in large-strain mode. In small-strain mode, this is the initial location of the node and does not change. The reference position corresponds to the nodal position at the time that the stiffness matrices of all finite elements that use the node were formed.

keywords.name: ratio-target
keywords.description: target local force ratio that is considered to be converged for mechanical calculations (see the ratio-target keyword in the structure node initialize command)

keywords.name: stiffness
keywords.description: translational and rotational stiffness expressed in the node-local system

keywords.name: system-local
keywords.description: orientation of the node-local coordinate system

keywords.name: system-surface
keywords.description: orientation of the surface coordinate system

keywords.name: unbalanced-force-local
keywords.description: unbalanced force and moment (equal to sum of all forces and moments acting on the node). The following keywords, if present, specify the coordinate system in which these values are expressed. values are expressed in the global system values are expressed in the node-local system. This is the default if no keyword is specified.

keywords.name: velocity-local
keywords.description: translational and rotational velocity. The following keywords, if present, specify the coordinate system in which these values are expressed. values are expressed in the global system values are expressed in the node-local system. This is the default if no keyword is specified.
